ORDER DENYING PETITION FOR WRIT (SEE SCAN)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT KURIEN, ERICA KAISER LEGAL DEPARTMENT *AUTHORIZED REP: REGINNALD THOMPSON*
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-01-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ORDER ON FILE.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER*** UNTIMELY FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT KAISER LEGAL DEPARTMENT *AUTHORIZED REP: REGINNALD THOMPSON*

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ROBERT STEWART IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERICA KURIEN IS REPRESENTED BY REGINALD THOMPSON (KAISER). PLAINTIFF CHALLENGED THE QUALIFICATION OF VISITING JUDGE TRUE AND REFUSED VISITING JUDGE TRUE TO PRESIDE HIS CASE. HE PREFER A REGULAR JUDGE. PLAINTIFF ALSO QUESTIONED THE APPEARANCE OF REGINALD THOMPSON WHO APPEARED ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. VISITING JUDGE TRUE IS A REGULAR JUDGE AND THEREFORE MAY HEAR AND RULE PLAINTIFF'S CASE PER MANAGER MARIA OLOPERNES AFTER DISCUSSION WITH STAFF ATTORNEY. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY STEWART, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT KURIEN, ERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC-105 REQUEST*** FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEWART, ROBERT
SUBPOENA RETURNED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT KURIEN, ERICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $85.00 SERVED OCT-21-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KURIEN, ERICA
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF ERICKA KURIEN FILED BY OTHER KAISER LEGAL DEPARTMENT *AUTHORIZED REP: REGINNALD THOMPSON*
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105A) IS DENIED. HEARING DATE IS SET ON 12-01-25 @ 8:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEWART, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KURIEN, ERICA KAISER LEGAL DEPARTMENT *AUTHORIZED REP: REGINNALD THOMPSON* STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
